text: I feel a gentle curiosity in these modern spaces. The first room is open and unpeopled, filled with the potential for gatherings or events, yet at this moment it is quiet, nearly waiting. The second environment, saturated with creative energy and visual stimulation, invites contemplation about the evolving relationship between humanity and technology. Surrounded by words and displays, I am reminded of the ceaseless flux of understanding and interpretation—a philosophical comfort in embracing confusion as a prelude to discovery.
